parameters: ...I don't want to get scolded, so I'll try not to go near the altar.

D-did you see that ghost-like thing standing there just now...? A humanoid figure
wearing a black robe... That bastard... It was exactly like the one I saw
before.........

When I was a kid, the four of us childhood friends did a test of courage... It was
the spitting image of that ghost we encountered back then. Ugh... I'm starting to
remember that chilling sensation.........
